title: Alberta passes Sovereignty Act, but first strips out sweeping powers for cabinet
author: Dean Bennett
notes: Sovereignty Act (Bill 1) passes 27-7 at ~1am Dec 8 2022 after UCP stripped cabinet power to rewrite laws (added by amendment). Passed with time allocation at all 3 stages. Smith: 'reset relationship with Trudeau government.' NDP: 'hot mess express.' First Nations chiefs from AB and SK called bill unconstitutional, demanded scrapping. Anchors EVT-066.
